overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban plaza at sunset. The player moves past a yellow commercial building, circles a prominent golden dolphin statue, and explores the perimeter of a massive collapsed stadium structure with purple neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking along a debris-strewn street past commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: character sitting against the yellow building wall

entered.detail: yellow commercial building with solar panels and illuminated signage reading PURE OVERKILL
tall palm tree silhouetted against the sunset sky
scattered garbage bags and debris along the sidewalk
modern street lamp with dual fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street lined with trash piles and palm trees. The camera moves forward past a distinctive yellow building with 'PURE OVERKILL' signage and solar panels on the roof. A few pedestrians are scattered throughout the scene as the sun casts long golden shadows across the asphalt.

events.description: emerging from narrow street into open plaza with golden statue visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the golden dolphin statue while navigating through scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: large golden sculpture of two dolphins on a tiered white pedestal
makeshift vendor stalls with blue and white canopies

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a wide open plaza dominated by a striking golden dolphin statue on a white pedestal. The camera moves steadily toward this landmark while pedestrians walk through the space. Market stalls line the left side, and the massive collapsed stadium structure becomes visible in the background to the right.

events.description: passing the golden dolphin statue on the left while turning slightly right

agents.ego_description: circling the dolphin statue and moving alongside the massive collapsed structure

entered.detail: massive collapsed circular metal framework with purple neon lighting and tangled beams
large mounds of garbage covered with blue plastic tarps

segments.scene_description: Moving past the dolphin statue, the camera turns to reveal the massive scale of the collapsed stadium structure with its distinctive purple neon lights illuminating the twisted metal framework. The path leads through areas with significant trash accumulation covered in blue tarps, while palm trees dot the background against the sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown area with scattered trees near collapsed structure

events.description: moving from paved plaza into grassy area with tree cover

agents.ego_description: navigating through vegetation and trash piles around the perimeter of the collapsed structure

entered.detail: leafy deciduous trees partially obscuring the view
hillside houses with varied architecture visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to dirt and grass as the camera moves through scattered trees and vegetation. The collapsed stadium structure remains visible but now viewed through tree branches, creating a partially obscured perspective. Residential buildings appear on the distant hillside as the camera circles around the debris field.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascending away from plaza

events.description: beginning ascent up grassy hill away from the collapsed structure

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on a dirt path away from the plaza area toward the residential zone

entered.detail: utility poles with overhead electrical wires running along the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending a grassy hillside on a dirt path, moving away from the collapsed stadium which fades into the distance. Power lines run parallel to the path, and the residential buildings on the hill become more prominent as the camera climbs toward them, leaving the dystopian plaza behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban street through a dystopian plaza and finally up a residential hillside. It begins by moving past a yellow building with solar panels and Pure Overkill signage, where long golden shadows stretch across asphalt littered with trash and palm trees. As the camera enters a wide open plaza, the view shifts toward a prominent golden dolphin statue on a white pedestal, while market stalls appear to the left and a massive collapsed stadium looms in the background. The scene then turns toward the stadium's twisted metal framework illuminated by purple neon lights, passing through debris covered in blue tarps before the terrain transitions into dirt and grass. Finally, the camera ascends a grassy hillside along a dirt path lined with power lines, moving away from the fading stadium structure toward residential buildings on the distant hill.
